title: List order is lexicographic by filename
context: Items are listed by sorting .json filenames alphabetically. For IDs like REQ-1 through REQ-9 this matches numeric order, but REQ-10 sorts before REQ-2 lexicographically.
decision: Keep lexicographic sort order (Python's default sorted() on filenames) with no special numeric handling.
rationale: The sort is stable and predictable. Custom prefixes (FEAT, BUG, etc.) mean there is no universal numeric key anyway. Users who need strict numeric order can sort output themselves. Adding numeric sort would require parsing IDs and handling mixed-prefix lists.
